name: Delta SkyMiles® Platinum American Express Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn as high as 90,000 Bonus Miles after spending $3,000 in eligible purchases on your new Card in your first 6 months of Card Membership. Welcome offers vary and you may not be eligible.

earning_rates.notes: Worldwide, including takeout and delivery in the U.S.

annual_credits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck Credit
annual_credits.description: Statement credit every 4 years after you apply for Global Entry ($120) or TSA PreCheck ($85).

annual_credits.name: Rideshare Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $9.99 per month statement credit for rides with select rideshare services (such as Uber and Lyft) when you use your Delta SkyMiles Platinum Card.

annual_credits.name: Resy Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $10 per month statement credit for eligible Resy purchases when you use your Delta SkyMiles Platinum Card.

lounge_access.other: Delta Sky Club access when flying Delta

other_benefits: First checked bag free on Delta flights (saves up to $70 per round-trip per person)
